description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6 Docker image and defines the default stages build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that caches the node_modules/ directory with a push policy, runs `npm i gulp -g`, `npm i`, `gulp`, and `gulp build-test`, and publishes the built/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that pulls the node_modules/ cache, runs `npm i gulp -g`, `npm i`, and `gulp run-test`, and also stores the built/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that only runs on the master branch, sets the AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY variables from $AWS_KEY_ID and $AWS_KEY_SECRET, updates apt, installs python3-dev and python3-pip, upgrades pip via easy_install3, installs the AWS CLI, and finally syncs the built/ folder to the s3://gitlab-game-demo bucket in us-east-1 with public read grants, a no-cache cache-control header, and the delete option. The pipeline uses the node_modules/ cache across jobs and uploads the built artifacts for later use.
